\tzpentry{ID3561}{Quantum Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3561 introduces Quantum Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \hat H_{\rm rel}(t) = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2\mu}\nabla_r^2 + V_{\text{rel}}(r) + g\,\delta_\epsilon(r) + V_{\rm drive}(r,t). \]
